```csharp
using UdonSharp;
using UnityEngine;
using VRC.SDKBase;
using VRC.Udon;

public class ComplexControlFlow : UdonSharpBehaviour
{
    public int limit = 5;
    public int seed = 3;

    public void Start()
    {
        int i = 0;
        int j = 0;
        int sum = 0;
        bool flag = false;

        do
        {
            int local = i * seed;

            if (local % 2 == 0 && i < limit)
            {
                sum += local;
            }
            else if (local % 3 == 0 || i == 0)
            {
                sum -= local;
            }
            else
            {
                sum += 1;
            }

            j = 0;
            while (j < 4)
            {
                if (j == 2)
                {
                    j++;
                    continue;
                }

                sum += j;

                if (sum > 50)
                {
                    flag = true;
                    break;
                }

                j++;
            }

            if (flag)
            {
                break;
            }

            switch (i)
            {
                case 0:
                    sum += 10;
                    break;
                case 1:
                case 2:
                    sum += 20;
                    break;
                default:
                    sum += 30;
                    break;
            }

            for (int k = 0; k < 3; k++)
            {
                if (k == 1)
                {
                    continue;
                }
                sum += k;
            }

            i++;
        } while (i < limit);

        if (sum > 0 ? true : false)
        {
            Debug.Log("Positive sum");
        }
        else
        {
            Debug.Log("Non-positive sum");
        }

        if (sum > 100)
        {
            Debug.Log("Large sum");
            return;
        }

        Debug.Log(sum);
    }
}
```

